presets.label: Cut
presets.description: Lighter day. Main meals stay useful and finishers close small gaps.

presets.label: Maintain
presets.description: Normal target day using the saved profile authority as the centre.

presets.label: Bulk
presets.description: Heavier day. Prefer bigger meal blocks before relying on finishers.

meal_bands.label: Light
meal_bands.description: Lower end of the saved hard range. Must be balanced by the day.

meal_bands.label: Standard
meal_bands.description: Normal target range for the meal slot.

meal_bands.label: Heavy
meal_bands.description: Upper end of the saved hard range. Useful for maintain and bulk days.

plain_english: Profiles hold the goal. Recipes hold proved per-person numbers. The planner combines light, standard, heavy, and finisher blocks without creating a new recipe for every calorie change.
